title: Extract NAV_ITEMS into shared useNavItems hook
description: NAV_ITEMS array (including badge logic) is duplicated between Sidebar and BottomNav in src/components/Layout/Sidebar.tsx. Extract into a single useNavItems() hook to eliminate duplication and make future nav changes a single-site edit.

title: Replace nested ternary in InvoicesListPage status badge with getBadgeClass helper
description: The status badge className in src/pages/invoices/InvoicesListPage.tsx uses a nested ternary that is hard to read and extend. Replace with a getBadgeClass(status) helper function for clarity and reuse.
